title: Brain met, craniotomy, no further treatment, how long?
body:
My fit 65 y/o mom found a 3cm brain met on 7/19, craniotomy on 7/25. She was offered follow-up SRS radiation and chemo but declined both as she’s had enough chemo/immuno etc. (previously had uterine and breast cancer as well) and has an ATM mutation which makes her more susceptible to radiation damage.

She’s getting an MRI on Sunday I guess to see if the tumor is growing back already? I know an impossible question bc she defied the odds with surviving uterine cancer 15years ago but approximately long does she have to live without any interventions aside from good diet and vitamins and she wants to take Ivermectin? Although I know controversial it’s what she wants.
